items.title: Australia toughens kids' social media ban, doubles potential penalties for tech firms
items.summary: Under the changes, the maximum penalty for systematic failures to uphold the ban jumps ‌to A$99 million ($68 million) from A$49.5 million
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
